name: Pan Fried Black Bass with Maitre D'hotel Sauce
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------THE FISH----------------------------------
1. In a bowl, soften the butter and cream it with a fork.
2. Add salt and pepper to the softened butter.
3. Mix in the smashed garlic and lemon juice until well combined.
4. Incorporate the finely minced parsley into the sauce.
5. Serve the sauce in a gravy boat using a spoon.
6. Pan fry the bass:
- Season the fish with salt and fresh pepper.
- Cook the bass, ensuring to brown it on both sides without overcooking.
7. Serve hot on hot plates, passing the sauce alongside.
